Museum admission for The Met Fifth Avenue.

Michelin-starred Korean steakhouse anchor. Best value path is the Butcher's Feast. Resy online booking starts at 2 guests and the 1-guest URL redirects to 2, so a solo dinner would need a phone call or walk-in/Undercote backup.
Booked for Thu Jul 30, 2026 at 7:00 PM. Dinner is planned as a 90-minute meal.
Optional third anchor near Central Park South. Rendered OpenTable flow confirms 1 person at 7:00 PM with seating options.
Reserve museum admission or tours.
Timed museum admission.

Solo online reservations are not the clean path here. Best attempt is a late lunch walk-in around 2:30-3:30 PM, or call Brooklyn directly for same-day solo guidance. Bring cash or debit; Brooklyn does not take normal credit cards.

1.label: Airport taxi or ride-hail: Newark to Arlo Midtown
1.estimate: Rough airport transfer: 35-70 min depending on traffic.

1.label: Midtown subway/walk spine: hotel, MoMA, ESB
1.estimate: Mostly walk/subway hops: 10-20 min between major stops.

2.label: Subway spine: Midtown to UWS / AMNH
2.estimate: Hotel to Central Park/UWS: 15-25 min; AMNH to Lincoln Center/UWS dinner: 15-25 min.

3.label: Subway spine: Midtown, Battery Park, 9/11, Theater District
3.estimate: Hotel to Battery Park: 25-35 min; 9/11 area to Theater District: 25-35 min.

4.label: West Side spine: Chelsea, High Line northbound, Intrepid, West Village
4.estimate: Morning Little Island/Chelsea/High Line is mostly walking south-to-north; Hudson Yards to Intrepid is 15-25 min by bus/walk; West Village back to hotel: 20-30 min.

5.label: East Side spine: UES, The Met, Roosevelt Island / Midtown
5.estimate: Hotel to The Met/UES: 25-35 min; UES to Roosevelt Tram/Midtown dinner: 15-30 min.

6.label: Downtown spine: NoHo / SoHo, Chinatown, LES, Theater District
6.estimate: Hotel to SoHo/NoHo: 20-30 min; LES/Chinatown to Theater District: 20-35 min.

7.label: Brooklyn spine: bridge, DUMBO, Transit Museum / Williamsburg
7.estimate: Hotel to Brooklyn Bridge: 20-30 min; Brooklyn to Williamsburg: 20-35 min; return to hotel: 25-40 min.

8.label: Flexible uptown spine: Harlem, MCNY / Guggenheim, Midtown
8.estimate: Hotel to Harlem: 25-35 min; Harlem to museum options: 15-30 min; return to Midtown: 20-30 min.

9.label: Airport taxi or ride-hail: Arlo Midtown to JFK
9.estimate: Early-morning airport transfer: roughly 35-60 min; leave extra buffer for JFK.
